title: Racosperma lamprocarpum
taxonomy: Racosperma lamprocarpum is classified within the family Fabaceae. This species is a part of the genus Racosperma. uses: Racosperma lamprocarpum, commonly known as the Golden Wattle, has been used in traditional medicine due to its purported health benefits.
